message:
fix(core): improve error handling, fix rate-limit metric, and clean up formatting

mcp_tools.rs:
- Return an explicit MCP error envelope for unknown agent_type values
  instead of silently returning None (which would show all rules
  regardless of the invalid filter). This gives callers a clear error
  message with valid type options.

policy.rs:
- Remove the sudo-aware command candidate check that would peek at the
  next token after "sudo" — this logic was unreachable/redundant since
  the compound-command checks (&&, ||, |, ;) already cover piped sudo
  invocations, and bare "sudo <cmd>" is handled by the main is_match.
- Remove a redundant `continue` after a match arm that already falls
  through correctly (worst_outcome Deny branch in gate evaluation).

tailer.rs:
- Fix CaptureScheduler rate-limit metric: the global_rate_limited
  counter was incrementing whenever ready_panes was non-empty AND
  max_captures_per_sec > 0, but the correct condition is when
  budget_limit == 0 (i.e., the budget is actually exhausted). The old
  condition would false-positive on any tick with pending panes.

replay_capture.rs:
- Reformat import groups, struct literals, and match arms to conform
  to rustfmt standards (no logic changes).

proptest_input_reserve.rs:
- Prefix unused `total_shed` accumulator with underscore to silence
  dead-code warning; the variable was accumulated but never asserted.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
